results.steps: Open the Phase 10 LMS admin page on desktop light mode.
results.expected: The Enterprise LMS admin page renders successfully.

results.precondition: A valid academic offering is available for the CSE department.
results.steps: Create a Phase 10 LMS course with a lesson through the admin API.
results.expected: Course creation succeeds and returns a lesson id.

results.precondition: Authenticated teacher session exists for the same academic offering.
results.steps: Open the teacher LMS workspace on desktop light mode.
results.expected: The teaching workspace loads without critical UI failures.

results.steps: Upload learning material, attach a video asset, and publish the lesson.
results.expected: Material upload, video creation, and publication all succeed.

results.steps: Schedule a live class for the published lesson.
results.expected: The live class is created with a join url.

results.precondition: A published video lesson is available to the student.
results.steps: Open the student LMS page on tablet dark mode, watch the video, and resume playback.
results.expected: The course appears in the student LMS, and video progress persists across resumes.

results.precondition: A live class has been scheduled for the lesson.
results.steps: Join the live class and update learning progress.
results.expected: Attendance and lesson progress are recorded successfully.

results.precondition: The student can access the lesson discussion area.
results.steps: Create a discussion thread and post a reply.
results.expected: Both discussion actions succeed and are persisted.

results.precondition: The student has created progress and discussion data for the course.
results.steps: Open the course detail page on mobile dark mode and inspect persisted progress data.
results.expected: The mobile course page renders, and progress/discussion records are present.
